rationale: Romanian government formation remains the dominant domestic story; regional security and energy backdrop unchanged from prior cycle.

top_events.title: Romanian government formation — confidence vote pending
top_events.summary: Liberal PM nominee still awaiting parliamentary confidence vote; political uncertainty continues to affect economic policy and EU funds absorption in Romania.

top_events.title: Israeli strike on Beirut, Iran deal still close per Trump
top_events.summary: Ongoing Beirut strikes keep energy price volatility risk alive for Romania; no new escalation beyond prior cycle but situation remains unresolved.

top_events.title: EU set to hold membership talks with Ukraine
top_events.summary: Continued EU-Ukraine accession process is a slow positive for Romania's neighborhood stability, but no qualitative change this cycle.
